fighter.name: Fighter
fighter.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with weapons and armor.

wizard.name: Wizard
wizard.description: A scholarly magic-user who commands arcane power through study.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: A warrior of the wilderness, skilled in tracking and nature magic.

paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.description: A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath, combining martial prowess with divine magic.
